message:
chore(gate): update Section 10.8 verification gate evidence after bd-3ly7 gap closure

Updated evidence and summary to reflect safe-mode hardening:
- 110 Rust tests (up from 93), SMO-001..007 event codes
- Real trust verification with SHA-256 evidence digests
- bd-3ly7 gap closure documented
- Gate: 36/36 checks PASS, 35 Python tests PASS

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
   "bead_id": "bd-1fi2",
   "section": "10.8",
   "title": "Section 10.8 verification gate: Operational Readiness",
-  "timestamp": "2026-02-21T03:00:00Z",
+  "timestamp": "2026-03-09T07:15:00Z",
   "gate": true,
   "verdict": "PASS",
   "overall_pass": true,
@@ -22,19 +22,22 @@
     "spec_files_verified": 6
   },
   "section_beads": {
-    "bd-tg2": "PASS — Fleet control API for quarantine/revocation operations (108 checks, 52 Rust tests)",
-    "bd-3o6": "PASS — Structured observability + stable error taxonomy (30 checks, 81 Python tests)",
-    "bd-k6o": "PASS — Deterministic safe-mode startup and operation flags (93 Rust tests)",
-    "bd-f2y": "PASS — Incident bundle retention and export policy (34 checks, 40 Rust tests)",
-    "bd-nr4": "PASS — Operator runbooks for high-severity trust incidents (6 categories)",
-    "bd-3m6": "PASS — Disaster-recovery drills for control-plane failures (5 scenarios)"
+    "bd-tg2": "PASS — Fleet control API for quarantine/revocation operations (66 Rust tests, 5 event codes, 5 invariants)",
+    "bd-3o6": "PASS — Structured observability + stable error taxonomy",
+    "bd-k6o": "PASS — Deterministic safe-mode startup and operation flags (110 Rust tests, 7 event codes, 4 invariants)",
+    "bd-f2y": "PASS — Incident bundle retention and export policy (40 Rust tests)",
+    "bd-nr4": "PASS — Operator runbooks for high-severity trust incidents",
+    "bd-3m6": "PASS — Disaster-recovery drills for control-plane failures"
+  },
+  "gap_closures": {
+    "bd-3ly7": "CLOSED — Replaced placeholder safe-mode trust re-verification and fake duration math with ledger-backed deterministic checks (SHA-256 evidence digest, ct_eq hash comparison, anomaly classification, chrono RFC-3339 duration parsing)"
   },
   "acceptance_criteria": {
     "AC1_all_beads_pass": "PASS — 6/6 section beads have PASS verdicts",
     "AC2_fleet_control": "PASS — Fleet quarantine/revocation API with 5 operations, convergence tracking, safe-start mode",
-    "AC3_observability": "PASS — Structured observability with FLEET-001..005 and SMO-001..004 event codes",
-    "AC4_safe_mode": "PASS — Deterministic safe-mode startup with INV-SMO invariants",
-    "AC5_dr_drills": "PASS — 5 DR scenarios with SLOs documented",
-    "AC6_deterministic_gate": "PASS — Gate verdict is deterministic and machine-readable"
+    "AC3_observability": "PASS — Structured observability with FLEET-001..005 and SMO-001..007 event codes",
+    "AC4_safe_mode": "PASS — Deterministic safe-mode with real trust verification (TrustVerificationInput, AnomalyClassification, DegradedDisposition), INV-SMO invariants",
+    "AC5_dr_drills": "PASS — DR scenarios with SLOs documented",
+    "AC6_deterministic_gate": "PASS — Gate verdict is deterministic and machine-readable (36 checks, 35 Python tests)"
   }
 }

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 # bd-1fi2: Section 10.8 Verification Gate — Operational Readiness
 
-**Section:** 10.8 | **Verdict:** PASS | **Date:** 2026-02-21
+**Section:** 10.8 | **Verdict:** PASS | **Date:** 2026-03-09
 
 ## Metrics
 
@@ -21,14 +21,20 @@
 | bd-nr4 | Operator runbooks for high-severity trust incidents | PASS |
 | bd-3m6 | Disaster-recovery drills for control-plane failures | PASS |
 
+## Gap Closures
+
+| Bead | Description | Status |
+|------|-------------|--------|
+| bd-3ly7 | Replace placeholder safe-mode trust re-verification with ledger-backed deterministic checks | CLOSED |
+
 ## Key Capabilities Verified
 
-- **Fleet Control**: Quarantine/revocation with zone/tenant scoping, convergence tracking, safe-start mode
-- **Observability**: Structured events (FLEET-001..005, SMO-001..004) with stable error codes
-- **Safe-Mode**: Deterministic startup with operation flags, 93 Rust unit tests
+- **Fleet Control**: Quarantine/revocation with zone/tenant scoping, convergence tracking, safe-start mode (66 Rust tests)
+- **Observability**: Structured events (FLEET-001..005, SMO-001..007) with stable error codes
+- **Safe-Mode**: Deterministic startup with real trust verification (SHA-256 evidence digests, ct_eq hash comparison, anomaly classification, chrono RFC-3339 duration parsing), 110 Rust unit tests
 - **Incident Retention**: Bundle retention and export policy with 40 Rust unit tests
-- **Runbooks**: 6 operator runbooks for high-severity trust incidents
-- **DR Drills**: 5 disaster-recovery scenarios with SLOs
+- **Runbooks**: Operator runbooks for high-severity trust incidents
+- **DR Drills**: Disaster-recovery scenarios with SLOs
